Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Imperialists]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Greenwardens claim Imperialists drove them out of town.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Imperialists are an alliance consisting of the Magisters, the Blackwatch, the Imperial Guard, and the Navigators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Imperialists are a group that cannot keep an Emperor on the throne if he is under threat of Elder possession.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Imperialists are drawing up their forces surrounding the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Imperialists want to keep the Emperor on the throne.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — The Imperialists are attempting to raise a fake Emperor.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperialists are a group involved in the current scenario.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperialists cleared out the room at the top of the Rose Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Imperialists are a faction that could be blamed for killing Guild Heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Calder Marten was part of a group of Imperialists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Imperialists are a faction involved in peace meetings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — The headquarters belongs to the Imperialists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Imperialists are standing opposite Jorin and Nathanael Bareius.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
